reviews.author: Jeroen De Koninck
reviews.text: Definitely worth to go to the Skywalk - it’s easier (and safer) on foot than by bike. Not too many people attempt it by bike given any wrong move with make you tumble about 1,500 meters down. To get to the infamous rock (or the top) you have to climb. It’s extremely hot there and not easily accessible. Especially when there are many tourists, paths are even narrower and a wrong move will result in certain death.

reviews.author: Sabri Kürüm
reviews.text: A must do in Vietnam imo. I enjoyed the experience better with an easy rider as you can focus on the view easier. The pics dont do justice to how beautiful this route looks

reviews.author: RenOverSea
reviews.text: This is the best pass I ever conquered. It's called the King of Mountain Passes due to its sheer magnificence and the rugged landscape it traverses, offering not only jaw-dropping views but also heart pounding sensations when traversing high over the Nho Que River that is winding far below through a canyon so deep that it feels otherworldly.

reviews.author: Chuong Nguyen
reviews.text: Incredible view of mountains, amazing landscape and lovely local people. The far north region of Vietnam with beautiful mountain pass. It's gorgeous, the best scenery I've seen in Vietnam.

reviews.author: Kevin Simacon
reviews.text: Always love the outdoors and adventure! If you want to experience real Vietnam exploration, you have to try the Ha Giang Loop. Stunning mountains, winding roads, friendly locals, and nonstop scenic stops — it’s the ultimate Vietnam adventure for nature lovers and thrill-seekers. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Fan
reviews.text: Ma Pi Leng Pass is definitely the most beautiful part of Ha Giang Loop, as the views are simply astonishing. Drive through the mountains and see the crystal blue lake way down below you. It is a sight that one will hardly ever forget!

reviews.author: Sivakumar Panchu
reviews.text: Excellent sceneries. The view of nho que river from Ma Pi Leng pass (800 M ) is awesome. Boating on NHO QUE river(120000 VND per person, 20000 VND per camera) is really worth.

reviews.author: Will Langston
reviews.text: Incredible views. Park your bike and 20 minute walk on the side of the mountains. Watch your step. Also, expect small children to ask you for money as you arrive. Enjoy the view! It’s worth the stop, don’t miss this one on your adventure.

reviews.author: Lesson One
reviews.text: The Mã Pí Lèng Pass is a mountain pass on the Highway 4C in the territory of Pai Lung and Pa Vi commune, Hà Giang province, North Vietnam. It is approximately 20 kilometres (12 mi) long, on the section of the Highway 4C connecting the towns of Đồng Văn and Mèo Vạc. It is at the altitude of 1,500 m (4,921 ft).The road was first built by Yao, H'mong, Tay and Lolo minority people. The view is very attractive and stunning. It's the main spot of Ha Giang Loop. You can choose some tours in Ha Giang City. There are many choice for you to travel around whole Ha Giang province. Oh the top of Mã Pí Lèng Pass, you can see the river Sông Nho Quế . And there is a famous cliff called Hẻm vực Tu Sản. The view is really wonderful.

reviews.author: D Ng
reviews.text: Đèo quá đẹp. Các bạn nên đi thử. Một trong nhưng cung đường đẹp nhất mình từng đi. The pass is very scenic and amazing. You should go here to see the beauty of northern Vietnam. It is one of the most beautiful passes in VN. Caution: dont buy the stuff they sell on the road, it is all fake mushroom.

reviews.author: Phi Duong
reviews.text: Riding motorbike in cold weather with bff and seeing high moutains, local people climbed on the mountain side to cut grass without fear. I never thought i could see something like this before. I will be back in the future in spring to see blossoms.

reviews.author: Wáng Ān
reviews.text: Ma Pi Leng Pass is the ultimate thrill ride in Vietnam's northern highlands—those hairpin turns hugging sheer cliffs with canyons plummeting thousands of feet below? It's like nature's own rollercoaster, dishing out jaw-dropping panoramas of layered mountains and the winding river far beneath. The wind in your face, the vast openness—it's raw, exhilarating, and a tad intimidating, but in the best way possible. I snagged my driver tour via Joytime, and it was a total win—the guy was a pro navigator with hilarious stories about local legends, making me feel super fortunate to conquer this beast without a hitch. If Ha Giang's on your itinerary, this pass is non-negotiable for that unforgettable rush!

reviews.author: Nguyetluatsu Nguyen
reviews.text: The most beautyfull i knew in my life

reviews.author: Irina K.
reviews.text: We made a trip of total 1300 km by bikes from Hanoi to Ma pi leng. Rice fields, waterfalls, small villages and great curves on the way!! Totally worth a visit!

reviews.author: lena bucatariu
reviews.text: I was here in October 2019 and loved it. After 12 years in the country and lots of travel, this is to me the most beautiful part of Vietnam

reviews.author: Henry Akes
reviews.text: MAP PIN IN WRONG SPOT! The whole main road is the ma pi leng pass and it’s very beautiful. However do not to go the google maps pin, it is on the skywalk and it is dangerous and very touristy. Just do the main road from Meo Vac to Dong Van. It’s amazing.

reviews.author: Thanh Nguyen
reviews.text: It made me a truly excited motion ! The most wonderful place in Ha Giang.

reviews.author: Quý Hà Phú
reviews.text: Amazing lanscape , lovely local people . Best time of my life

reviews.author: Dinh Thang
reviews.text: The pass's highest point is at 1.200 meters. Many think that the highest point is at the popular photostops (the Visitor Center). Indeed the it is at about 3.5 kilometers north of the Visitor Center.

reviews.author: บูรณ์ ตี๋ก๋วยจั๊บ
reviews.text: Ma pi leng pass, the most beautiful route in Vietnam.

reviews.author: Giang Đỗ
reviews.text: Beaufiful, amazing, wow wow every turn…

reviews.author: Khai Trinh Cao
reviews.text: That's the most beautiful pass in Vietnam

reviews.author: Lily Ng
reviews.text: Awsome especially on a clear day.

reviews.author: Hải Nguyễn
reviews.text: The best pass in Viet Nam, the most beautiful in Ha Giang.!!!

reviews.author: Mai Vu
reviews.text: Ma Pi Leng, Meo Vac, Ha Giang, one of the most spectacular places in Ha Giang - the far north region of Vietnam 🇻🇳, a must see during your trip in this country. I tell you one thing: the best way to go there should be by motorbike 🏍 because it is so excited from my experience.

reviews.author: Joosten winnie
reviews.text: Did a package tour with Vietnam Tonkin travel, we had amazing experience on this Ha Giang tours, gorgeous scenery. View from Ma Pi Leng peak was brilliant!
